compiled_state.title: Create EAGAIN full-path integration test with mock runners
compiled_state.author: Main
compiled_state.description:
## Description

Create tests/hooks/test-integration-eagain-full-path.sh — an integration test that verifies the full EAGAIN retry → reclassification → non-blocking gate path using mock runners via RECORD_TEST_STATUS_RUNNER.

This test verifies implementations from dependency stories ccb7-ce69 (suite-engine retry), ea0c-08b0 (gate non-blocking), and 861e-6dee (reclassification). All three must be implemented before this test passes GREEN.

## Implementation

Use RECORD_TEST_STATUS_RUNNER to inject mock runners that simulate EAGAIN failures. Each test function creates its own temp dir for isolation (ARTIFACTS_DIR, temp git repo for gate tests). Follow existing patterns from test-pre-commit-test-gate.sh and test-record-test-status-part2.sh for setup/teardown.

### Test Functions

1. **test_suite_engine_retries_on_eagain**: Mock runner exits 254 + "fork: Resource temporarily unavailable" on first call, passes (exit 0) on second call (retry). Verify suite-engine retries with MAX_PARALLEL=1 exported. Verify the retry succeeds.

2. **test_record_test_status_reclassifies_eagain**: Mock runner exits 254 + EAGAIN pattern. Invoke record-test-status.sh with --source-file. Verify test-gate-status line 1 = "resource_exhaustion".

3. **test_gate_allows_resource_exhaustion**: Set up temp git repo with staged files and test-gate-status containing "resource_exhaustion" + valid diff_hash. Invoke pre-commit-test-gate.sh check logic. Verify non-blocking exit (exit 0). Uses temp git repo pattern from existing gate tests.

4. **test_full_chain_with_intermediate_assertions**: Chain all 3 components with intermediate assertions:
   - Step A: Run suite-engine with mock runner → assert retry succeeded
   - Step B: Run record-test-status → assert test-gate-status = "resource_exhaustion"
   - Step C: Run gate check → assert exit 0 (non-blocking)

5. **test_no_retry_without_eagain_stderr**: Mock exits 254, no EAGAIN pattern in output. Verify NO retry occurs (dual-condition: exit code alone insufficient).

6. **test_no_reclassify_without_exit_254**: Mock exits 1, outputs EAGAIN pattern. Verify status = "failed" (dual-condition: EAGAIN pattern alone insufficient).

### Isolation Requirements
- Each test function creates its own temp dir via mktemp -d
- ARTIFACTS_DIR set per-function to temp dir
- Gate tests use temp git repo (git init + staged file + computed diff_hash)
- Cleanup via trap on EXIT

### .test-index
Add entry mapping suite-engine.sh, record-test-status.sh, and pre-commit-test-gate.sh to this test file. The test name is NOT fuzzy-matchable to any single source file (it spans 3 components), so .test-index is required.

## Files to Modify
- tests/hooks/test-integration-eagain-full-path.sh (CREATE)
- .test-index (EDIT — add mappings)

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] Test file exists
  Verify: test -f tests/hooks/test-integration-eagain-full-path.sh
- [ ] Contains at least 6 test functions
  Verify: grep -c "^test_" tests/hooks/test-integration-eagain-full-path.sh | awk '{exit ($1 < 6)}'
- [ ] All tests pass
  Verify: bash tests/hooks/test-integration-eagain-full-path.sh
- [ ] .test-index maps source files to integration test
  Verify: grep -q "test-integration-eagain-full-path" .test-index
- [ ] No syntax errors
  Verify: bash -n tests/hooks/test-integration-eagain-full-path.sh
- [ ] Each test function uses isolated temp dir (no shared state)
  Verify: grep -c "mktemp -d" tests/hooks/test-integration-eagain-full-path.sh | awk '{exit ($1 < 4)}'
- [ ] Unit test exemption: criterion 2 — test file with no business logic; any unit test would be a change-detector

comments.body: AC amendment: Mock runners must emit the exact EAGAIN patterns from the epic SC1: 'fork: (retry: )?Resource temporarily unavailable' or 'BlockingIOError.*Resource temporarily unavailable'. Both patterns must be tested. Verify environment variable overrides (WORKFLOW_PLUGIN_ARTIFACTS_DIR, _MERGE_STATE_GIT_DIR) redirect all state file paths to temp dirs.
comments.author: Main
